twitter_thread: 47% of Ultimate Dead by Daylight players have been banned for using aimbots in the last 6 months.
ESP wallhacks have a 73% detection rate within 12 hours of use.
AdilMir1433's auto-grind trainer has been used by 12k players, but 2k have been banned.
Bloodpoint bots account for 85% of all cheating reports in Ultimate Dead.
Aimbot detection algorithms are updated every 3 weeks, making them 40% more effective.
Only 12% of players with full perk/skin unlockers reach the top 1% of rankings.
What's the most effective way to climb the ranks in Ultimate Dead without cheating? #ultimatedead #gaming
